name: Paneer Butter Masala
steps: Heat butter in a pan and sauté chopped onions until golden.
Add tomato puree and cook until oil separates.
Add spices and salt, mix well.
Add paneer cubes and simmer for 5–7 minutes.
Add cream, simmer 2 minutes and serve hot.

name: Baingan Bharta
steps: Roast brinjal until soft, peel and mash.
Heat oil, sauté garlic and onions.
Add tomatoes and cook till soft.
Add mashed brinjal, spices and salt.
Cook 8–10 minutes and serve.

name: Tomato Soup
steps: Boil tomatoes, blend into puree.
Heat butter, sauté garlic briefly.
Add puree, salt and pepper, simmer 8 minutes.
Add cream and serve hot.

name: Veg Biryani
steps: Wash and soak rice 20 minutes, then cook 80%.
Sauté onions, add tomatoes and spices.
Layer rice and masala, cover and steam 10–12 minutes.
Serve hot with raita.

name: Aloo Gobi
steps: Heat oil, sauté onions.
Add tomatoes and spices; cook 2 minutes.
Add potato and cauliflower, mix well.
Cover and cook until tender, stir occasionally.
